h0637c609gb571g4caagad23g21ea645f6497: A fine camp you have here. My apologies for showing up unannounced.
h3b69230ag73d1g4926g9591g196346977ecc: I owe you a debt for seeing to the goblins' leaders. Now I'm here to pay that debt.
hf7a72e4dgd8ceg4b21g8883gbc5b8e0fcb00: I wish to come with you, help solve this problem that's plaguing you. It's the least I can do.
h46871548g1b8bg46cbg846fgb435327f9737: I will join you, help you with that which plagues you. The Illithid curse is a blight to all nature.
h95000e6bge1c6g4bcag9abagf671d156b8c7: The path is now clear - we have to get to Moonrise Towers. Do you remember what I told you, about getting there?
hfd4989f2g2f8eg417fgb7bdg021544ef70c7: I remember. To Moonrise Towers then.
h290f4202gf768g4588g809bgf457f7091c50: Indeed, and may the Oak Father watch over us on our journey. We will speak soon, I'm sure.
h310c4e2ag26a3g4e5fgb7c0g9a23cb105cd7: There is a terrible curse surrounding Moonrise Towers - a shadow curse that drains away all light and life.
ha2733d0cgb189g423ag96dagf7e2d86703ed: Few can resist it without dying, or transforming into shadow beings. You can try to journey overland if you wish, but I strongly advise you you go under.
h5f15ba4fgd1d7g427dgbdfegbea747da4100: There is a tunnel leading from the temple of Selûne right down into the Underdark and beyond. The entrance is hidden somewhere in the ruins.
he155456fg2749g41a8g98dcgd7a2012bc562: I believe if you find this entrance, you'll discover a route that leads to Moonrise Towers, bypassing the worst of the shadow curse.
haf04921bg3a5fg4ff9ga032g004c93e03db9: Aradin and his lot were looking for the same entrance - they sought an artefact called the Nightsong that was supposed to be housed somewhere down there.
h046f05e3g54ccg471bg9152ge6fbfedccb48: Seems it's high time we got on our way.
hb2fffb5ag5b5cg4db5gb3ddg7874887ed57a: There is hope... but it isn't found here, at my hands - at least not yet.
he26ad6ffg7dcbg4952gbb0bgf5d4a7ff30dc: There's a chokehold of magic, binding the creature to you. Any efforts to remove it would almost certainly kill you - or worse.
h29fcf079gce06g4a8agbd52g11b2d5f829d3: You promised you'd do something about my infection.
h91108defgc8bag40e3gade7g26d8ab6c1cdd: Patience. I can't just snap my fingers... but I know where the solution almost certainly lies -  Moonrise Towers.
h9dd7a411g75b5g4813g9f1ag8abc03c12482: It's the source of this magic, and where the cultists send their captives - to be infected. They're building an army. Innocents go in, True Souls come out.
h58d620e3gb047g4e5cgbe37g177703c693d2: Find whoever's behind the parasites and the magic. If we can understand it, then perhaps we can cure it - provided you survive long enough.
h85385679ga57dg4684gaa2dg604215e03825: Luckily, you have time - this magic has slowed your ceremorphosis to a crawl. I just can't fathom why someone would do that.
ha4daa968gd81eg4586gb662g870b9ba21144: Just when a cure seemed in reach. To Moonrise Towers, then. May the sun and stars guide us.
h8a3455cbg6709g450cgb05bgba117760baa0: Moonrise Towers? What is that place?
h2f816d21g9b31g4844g9ba0g5916f7e375ac: An ancient citadel, abandoned for years - and for very good reason - until these cultists took it over.
hc8d4f981gfe22g4193ga5afg2b4b2db98ded: Apart from facing legions of Absolute followers? The whole region is shrouded in a curse - a shadow curse.
hf2a7cdf8gdcdeg4122g9483g520153a85383: For years now, this curse has consumed all light and life. It spits out only darkness and despair.
h4a58fd43g1c6dg4486ga484ga52ada5d21e2: Few survive long - those who do are transformed by the curse. It is not a place to venture into lightly.
he9aa2e9bg8c14g4e92gbdd1gac6adc4515ca: There's no time to spare then - to Moonrise Towers.
h5943e027g7dbag452dgb632g6b9560abcc70: Wait, please. There's more. The whole region around Moonrise is shrouded in a curse - a shadow curse.
h3af272efg55dfg4548g8679gdf736a5626f6: Doesn't sound like I've much choice - I need to get to Moonrise, curse or not.
h9f73de13ga91dg42ecg8f17g79c38f2f554c: You're half-right - you have to get to Moonrise, but you still have a choice of how to get there.
h88188f9ag9ab3g46e2g978fg90ba93238812: You could go overland - along the Risen Road or through the mountains. Easier at first, but you'll run into the shadow curse eventually.
h6910266ege045g4b80g8811g59837a0386c5: You could also go under. There is a tunnel somewhere in the ruined temple of Selûne. It leads to Moonrise Towers through the Underdark.
ha4409c16gdea4g4effgb62dg90554f7a7088: Long ago, a man called Ketheric Thorm built a secret stronghold deep down there, before rallying a whole army of Dark Justiciars - Shar worshippers.
h2de92f6cga77fg4462gb893g17d8fbe97a1a: Dark Justiciars? I must see for myself.
h15c5909eg166ag4b61ga0b6gb0afeb415753: Aradin and his lot were looking for a way down there - they were promised riches if they retrieved a relic called the Nightsong. But I think there's more.
heddf800bga47fg4698gb153g3ff5c74ed2f6: From this stronghold, Ketheric's forces could access both the temple of Selûne and Moonrise Towers - but he was defeated before he could launch an attack.
hee1fe7e4g5943g45c1gb4abgb9b08a0e3c46: If you can find this place, I'll wager it will reveal a path to Moonrise Towers, bypassing the worst of the shadow curse.
h1dbd87e4g5f9fg496cg8515g1d2ff5fae1a5: I found the hidden entrance in the Temple of Selûne - the way is clear.
hef4d2fe3g1098g42fagaf5cg6b55dd204e55: Already...? If only I'd gone with you instead of Aradin.
hb7079550gd636g4a47gbe95gefe3c5da9ae8: I've already found a way into the Underdark. I can pick up the trail from there.
h42c97dd0gc504g4860gbb61gab31468d8c10: So how do I find this underground route?
h5991cbc7gb21bg4bdegb079g43fa7a6dda87: You'll need to pick up where Aradin left off - find the hidden entrance. It's somewhere in the temple of Selûne.
hdbeb760agba27g4928ga0abg82997a1a9fdd: One of the adventurers had a clue to help find it - a dwarf called Brian. It might still be found on his corpse, wherever the goblins left it.
hcc389481g8b47g4ac0gac76g427191da9fdf: I don't want to risk getting lost in the Underdark - I'll journey overland.
h9bc69aacg1e2dg4262gab29g117050b7cb05: You may reconsider once you see the effects of the curse for yourself.
h152c1390ge180g4633gaf94g5c8ec39b51a5: I would like to join your camp, if you'll allow me. I can offer my skills, my counsel.
hf752a3d0gfdc9g426cgba6fgad60394a9fe1: I've long sought to return to Moonrise Towers - unfinished business. It seems our fates have aligned.
h4a8257d1gb2eag4162gb6ebg26f75a311f94: How do I find this passage through the Underdark?
h01f836e6g524cg494fga6b9ge37eee34ffa6: Say I decide to try this Underdark route after all - how do I get started?
h468450e8g0cc5g4e97gbd56g4e901f8458cb: I advise you start in the temple of Selûne - if you find the Dark Justiciars' hidden entrance, it could lead you all the way to Moonrise.
h6ef87824g3265g4dd4gb81ag5e9ce4a424ec: You want to go to Moonrise yourself? Why?
hd2401b42g5837g4e5ag93c9gbdd225fe9b5a: Those illithid creatures threaten the natural order - it's my duty to do what I can to stop them.
haca3a5a2g7736g4cbfg9cdcga644fbd489f5: There's also the shadow curse - it's an affront and must be cleansed.
hdaa9e1a4g907eg4ebdg8439g9a32fc1dccf4: I helped overthrow Ketheric Thorm and his Dark Justiciars, years ago. But I failed to prevent him from unleashing darkness across the region before he was defeated.
hda3ab244g34beg48a4gb250g0f3dd42004b5: I spent years researching the curse, trying to put an end to it. Nothing has worked - yet.
h1e4b8f8dg4fdeg49a1gb57bg19570df78760: If I can join you and get close to Moonrise, perhaps I can lift this curse, same as you may find a cure for your infection.
h72949bbdgdcc3g4f8fgbe75g351a5c02ad72: Is that why you went with Aradin? You thought he might find this route to Moonrise?
hf232c8eagf09ag4446gb935g13dae6e36a1b: Precisely. Then perhaps I could have done something about both the shadow curse and ceremorphosis aberrations.
h46ffb760g110fg4935gb30cgccea040fc7d1: But in my eagerness, I put far too much faith in the abilities of Aradin and his band. We didn't even get close.
h5e5e8ccfgfe81g4538g97bcga29e2413745c: One of those who died had a clue that was supposed to help us find the hidden entrance to the Underdark.
h9eb23d37gd315g4f46gaf1cg22831d77b74e: A dwarf called Brian, I believe. Though there's no guarantee that the goblins left him recognisable.
hbd0aec9eg37e7g4123gbe80gb32f80263421: It's lost to me. Perhaps in time I can open it up to the world again, but for now, I must help you.
hb1657ef9g6feeg4e8eg8c82g21ecc4f00690: I've chosen a successor as First Druid - Francesca of the High Forest. A bird's already been dispatched to summon her.
h42eb4863g50e5g40d0g9852g1003fc049a15: First and only Druid. What will Francesca even do here?
ha312b9a7g58abg4111ga6d4gbc360860572e: She can tend to the grove, help it heal. In time, others will join. Perhaps some day I can return.
h55d4612bg76f9g46dbgbadega8a1821177d3: A fellow druid. I can count on her to tend to the grove in my absence. Help it heal.
hbf3ec53dg7bb4g40feg9b96ga9b49e63f3a3: Precisely! Who indeed? You do not know, and neither do any of the others.
h92eb0cbfg1d68g4cdcg9678gb96d1e67a081: The grove needs to move beyond the mistakes of the past. What it needs is an unknown quantity; an outsider who can enforce the Oak Father's teachings without bias.
h5fb25f21g354fg4b78g92c0gf777957eb1dd: This is why I chose Francesca. She will restore simplicity and purity to the grove in my absence.
h8cdb1dabg83d3g437dgaf86g5b9ef405290c: Contrary to how some think of us, we druids can play politics when necessary.
h794eb2e6g2181g4d89g9c8cge093382a63df: Now we've quite the journey ahead. Best get started.
h35d6f381gad44g411eg8e9ag00487ecd3a82: Resentment will spring up like mushrooms no matter what I do. You cannot please everyone and you'd be a fool to try.
h00359a15ged04g4891gb20ag2a853cdb00f4: Sounds like the grove will be in good hands then. We should get going.
hf38a7989gc68eg458cg9d79gd22156453e5d: Indeed. We've quite the journey ahead of us.
h1088e0f1ge481g49b0g886eg392c2f38025a: You mentioned you had unfinished business in Moonrise towers - what did you mean?
h6e12ec57g1f68g406cgbdd0g105e3439f7e0: There's nobody in the grove you'd chose?
h8f3d42b3g0f52g4e64gbd1fgf22efb60b599: No. At least, not right now.
hbb80f49fg1ab6g4846gbdf6g67597867794b: What about one of the others? Rath perhaps?
h6739edc6g8581g464cgb38ag8628d74c2116: Rath has promise, but he has a ways to go yet. He wasn't able to stop Kagha by himself. The grove needs experience, and a strong hand.
h9c4df261g2c1fg4dc7g911eg575edfccc9b8: I need her to stay focused on her training - the grove will need a skilled healer in my absence.
h055ecc74g4895g475egbad3gd3f16d8d4560: I'm glad you approve - I do not truly care if you approve, but I am glad.
hf5c42b30g35dbg49aag91b9ga11705e13795: I never thought I'd say this, but it sounds like the Underdark is the safer route.
h28ebc487g8785g4d2ag9c83g05dbcad5ee91: Anything is preferable to risking the shadow curse.
hfc170918g1545g423egb306gd70f29ddf7b8: The decision is yours, but I'd favour the Underdark. Even a place like that is the lesser evil compared to the shadow-cursed lands.
hf7edbd42g110eg44b2gb72cgd07183ca3986: This shadow curse - does it affect Shar worshippers?
hfe6a0088gea00g4db5ga4beg6a6d5f959365: I don't know. Ketheric's followers were defeated or vanished before the effects of the curse took hold.
h98fd55ebgeeb0g426eg84a5g8eaca79ac444: Are these Sharrans still to be found?
hd4556930g02d8g48a6ga869gb1679075d30a: As bones, perhaps. But their hidden structures might still remain.
hdab785eagf37cg437cg8349g983d2da67335: I know the Underdark - it's lethal. I'll travel overland.
hd2fcfa92g58f2g4277g85e8gacc9b215c52a: The Underdark's my home. Better to take that route than risk this curse.
he64b88a6g01adg411dgb8a2ge0c176cf365d: The Absolute's forces can tolerate such a place?
hf7f1489bg3e39g4c11g9551g16380e938d6f: So it seems, though I don't know how. You will have to choose your approach carefully.
h7351e4b5ge46fg4682ga4aag0e87e5306679: There must be other ways to cure myself - my kin have dealt with these parasites before.
ha37f2e18gfd43g47c9gb487gbadc4d159eff: I'm sure there must be other ways to cure myself.
hc0b5d06ege1aeg4bffga6bcg05168c07f7dc: By all means - pursue any leads you may have. But I sense all roads will lead to Moonrise, in the end.
h2f5544f0ge0b8g4346g981age0a446142162: How are you so sure Moonrise is where I have to go?
h32256b06g3398g4db8gaff3ga25e2970937b: Nature speaks to me. Birds report what they've seen. And I've overheard goblins speaking of it too. Moonrise is at the heart of all this, I'm sure of it.
h0d207c74g3e8eg492eg85a7g9c74f00f050c: I was expecting more from you than a lead towards some distant, dangerous prospect.
h731fb3begdabeg487cg8a2ag59f293a62943: I won't be held accountable just because you're naive enough to expect easy answers. Now allow me to continue.
h197d9305gc743g4cf3gb8bcgb06feb5e564d: That's it? Just go to this place?
ha5ed1221gf5c1g4cc6gbde4g2ba77bf85c95: What, were you expecting a spell? A potion? Or perhaps you thought I'd conduct a cack-handed operation on you right here.
h4bc6764dg2b50g47ceg8a3cg4648cdbaaf1b: What were you expecting? That I'd mumble a spell or whip out a potion?
he1d470f0ge471g40abgb102gdaec810ddf55: These tadpoles obey one master. If the ghaik have united in a single Creed, my Queen is in danger.
h7cb1c6d4g895cg4c7fgbaf8g1b5f0255cbef: Once we are cleansed, we infiltrate Moonrise Towers. Should there be ghaik, we snatch their heads, one by one.
hd2e38f8dg2b97g4c9bgae97gfd7bafb86c81: |Reacting to Halsin's revelation that we're going to have to go to Moonrise Towers in pursuit of a cure.|
h4982475cgb60fg4651g8abag3b3ce6d79a20: This is sobering news indeed, but there's no use crying over spilt milk. If this is our only option, to Moonrise Towers we go.
ha624aa68g7310g4087g9c60g0d6dbda57f1b: |Reacting to Halsin's revelation that we're going to have to go to Moonrise Towers in pursuit of a cure.|
h3a67c4f4gfb2bg4c18g9caeg5dc94011ffef: We get a cure and the chance to hit these assholes where they live? Sounds good to me.
hbea4455cg4c8dg4999g808fga59d30175eec: Finally, we're catching up on our puppet master. And the hunt ends at Moonrise Towers.
h46a98a66g9678g4d1agab9bg2b4f2a0af73a: I suppose it was too much to hope we were going to be cured here and now. To Moonrise, then.
h5339ababg1c88g4d76g867dg0eef1af08dbb: That doesn't sound much like hope to me. Can't you just help here and now?
h707ad8f6g41bag4d58g9598g1897d58c81b5: This magic isn't typical of ceremorphosis?
h553f0922g8b9cg4dcbg88a4gb3844ec815f8: No, this is different. Altered. But I believe I know where answers can be found - Moonrise Towers.
hb895eda1g9fceg48eagac7egf84eaaaf41f1: You learned all this from your studies?
h0c134997ge68dg4901gb11fgffa496341112: Indeed. After we dealt with the drow that ambushed us, Nettie and I were able to inspect the corpse - and the creature that slithered out of it.
hf9d24004gc6e4g4b14g9f35gff1d3d2a50ea: I had no idea anyone beyond their ranks was infected. You have my sincere sympathies.
h61e3e4c3gab09g48dfg9f9bgcfe7d3871ab7: This magic you mentioned - it isn't normal for these parasites?
hd08bd8d9g85f0g4f4dga1b5g172c1d3f2e7e: How do you know all this?
h42de90f4g849ag4e76g8e9ag8758eda3b9cb: A drow forced me to defend myself. Afterwards, I was able to study the parasite that slithered out of the corpse, see what drives these 'True Souls'.
h056d9639gdc10g4b33gaa4dga2bdaeae7a80: I heard how you saved the grove; it wouldn't be right for me to let you leave without expressing my gratitude.
h0ee56a3bg1065g4da9gab1bga2cba1bc2734: I have nowhere else to turn, it seems. I went to the grove, but... I cannot face what has happened there.
hfd60bcbcg3375g429fg8de5g33d13364bac1: It is sealed off to me, to the whole world. Forever, perhaps.
he460f94aga39bg44c7g80cfg084dbb4edd23: I am Halsin, First druid of the Emerald grove - and I owe you my thanks.
h64162b44gdc48g45d2g9c80g1c07daecfc91: If you hadn't killed the leaders of that goblin horde, the grove would be no more. I am in your debt.
h7bcf0f22g1376g447ega125ga5cc7d1725e0: Don't worry, I'm not here just to sing your praises. I believe I can help - with your tadpole.
hcb58c98agbee1g4a78g814bgfa7c9bc9b922: I am Halsin, First druid of the Emerald grove - which you saved. Thank you.
h5647614bg0c56g4588g9504g26a83ab82b26: I am Halsin, First druid of the Emerald grove.
hd349de90g6712g4932g8c84g736521d0b47f: Or I was, at least. I went there - the grove is sealed off to me, to the whole world.
h1411fb02gadf9g4bbegb3beg99a23daa0315: First druid? You sound like someone who could help with a problem I have...
he7249611gc215g4237g8cf6g645f981c1d17: I know. It's what brings me here.
h5b3b1feeg6877g4391gb7d9gca4723a1c86a: I sensed what was done to you from afar. Now let me confirm it; I need to know exactly what we're dealing with...
he804c90fg9151g4bf3gb354g1582d96cf87e: Oak Father preserve you, child... you're infected, aren't you? The mind flayers' spawn.
hfbdc8f4eg243ag4f2bga64bgfe4fb4c01ff5: But... something's different. You're aware of the monster inside you. You don't bow to the Absolute, like the True Souls do...
h2b132dc4g94bag4af7ga339g4ba81c3697db: I was right to seek you out. You're after a cure for this parasite.
h640fc71dg98e6g4edeg85e7g310e6d8f15b1: There's a chokehold of magic, binding the creature to you. Any efforts to remove it would almost certainly kill you - or worse.
hb6353f87g3990g4684g910bg4e5a5c6fd3a8: 'Almost'? That means I still have a chance. One I intend to take.
hd16c6830g8507g4051g8114gbebe7a9ecc3b: Your resolve is most admirable. It'll serve you well for where you've to go - Moonrise Towers.
h4ae871dcg42fag40abg835cg67d74735f993: That place is where the cultists send their captives. Innocents go in, True Souls come out. It has to be the source of this magic.
h3e467cedg8be7g4ba0g9944g6424f1d4f4d1: And you think I'll find a cure if I find this source at Moonrise?
h3b822311g77b8g4648gb1d9g258578a4f104: Precisely. If we can understand just what this magic is, then perhaps we can rid you of this parasite.
hfdea01e1g63bcg4688gb821g0d483d23134a: It's immensely powerful, whatever it is - strong enough to slow ceremorphosis to a crawl. Luckily that gives you more time.
hd4e2f1cbg6925g4b44ga706gd3781f2ca1d9: That must be where the ship was taking me - before it crashed.
h712a3b16g3682g4ea1ga02ag98033c36281b: Be glad it did, or you'd be a True Soul by now.
h37a401ffgd31cg421dg9bd3g9d589ff7b9cf: If we can get to Moonrise and  understand just what this magic is, then perhaps we can rid you of this parasite.
hab8335b4g4cfcg4c52gaf08g45fb5eef0200: I wasn't taken to Moonrise - I was infected on a mind flayer ship, before it crashed.
hea670f92g9c6dg4244ga7fdg96871f76487f: And where do you suppose that ship was taking you? Moonrise, I'll wager. The journey differs, but the problem is the same.
h31e23991gf3dag415dgada6gad3b5954c78a: That doesn't sound much like hope to me. Can't you help?
h648a20ecga816g4e56g8ae0gf6ba8bbc373e: Patience. I can't just snap my fingers... but I know where the solution almost certainly lies -  Moonrise Towers.
h6db9d1abga592g4da7ga325gc67472ffe7bf: This magic isn't typical of ceremorphosis?
h4cc920f5g98bbg4e75g8ffdga185253ab1d9: No, this is different. Altered. But I believe I know where answers can be found - Moonrise Towers.
h1f086141g46d4g4217ga057g19e1f22b6c0a: You learned all this from your studies?
h586f9e0bgfea7g40d4g855ega619a31e2cef: Indeed. After we dealt with the drow that ambushed us, Nettie and I were able to inspect the corpse - and the creature that slithered out of it.
hcad06531g7c47g46ddg8afag547c60f09a07: I had no idea anyone beyond their ranks was infected. You have my sincere sympathies.
h5a55f3f9g1604g4e98g9376g217161d30024: This magic you mentioned - it isn't normal for these parasites?
h8e4dd4dfge268g431bgb4cfgb22c7396177e: How do you know all this?
h8f617226gae89g45cdg89c6g56e4b8563768: A drow forced me to defend myself. Afterwards, I was able to study the parasite that slithered out of the corpse, see what drives these 'True Souls'.
h7428a1cbg4f18g42f3g8d14g832d889aece3: I escaped from an illithid ship after being infected. Maybe the process was interrupted.
h7ea386cdg607cg49b8gbbccg72ebe4ca94ed: Perhaps... but I wouldn't want to place all my faith in blind luck.
hfa4141fcged48g4228gb4e5g444e671647f3: A being called Orpheus is protecting me; shielding me from the worst of the parasite's magic.
h9e0f537cg8207g4cd8g8ec7g893c5b5b2cd1: That sounds... novel. But all right, who is this Orpheus? I'd like to bend the ear of anyone who knows about these things.
hcb88911ag16efg484eg9180g33784006117b: It's... complicated. But he's proven helpful. Trust me.
h9f692dfaga371g4ea0gb37age70be0deeb83: I'd still be target practice for goblins if you hadn't come along. I think I can trust you.
hab668bdagdf75g402fg85cfg50832c3682f3: This 'Orpheus' character might be offering you protection, but it sounds like you still need to find a cure - that's something I can help with.
h62f50b72g017ag434ag86e1g967b4ff2ddb6: But I'm afraid it won't be easy, or quick.
h775d5d90g3430g41cbg9d55g3bae4660ce87: I don't know the truth about him. I'm not sure he even has an ear to bend.
hb0763f9eg0287g4187gb840g360b1b0c0cba: Hmm. There's only so much stock you can place in mysterious friends with unknown agendas.
hcfcca144g877eg4380g8e9agbcb8bbb653e0: Thank you. I will grieve when I can, but for now, I must find another way to serve nature - by helping you.
he4e7cddfg6d3ag477cgb150g4951567e13b4: Forget about the grove. What are you doing here?
